config.moemusic.ncmlite.source.playlist_: Numeric Netease playlist ID. Leave blank to disable auto-play list loading.
config.moemusic.ncmlite.source.add_track: Song IDs appended to the generated auto-play list after the main source list is built.
config.moemusic.ncmlite.source.remove_tr: Song IDs removed from the generated auto-play list before additional tracks are appended.
config.moemusic.ncmlite.source.max_sound: Maximum audio quality level requested from Netease Music when resolving a track URL. Higher levels require a matching VIP subscription.
config.moemusic.ncmlite.source.validatio: Playlist ID must contain only digits.
error.moemusic.ncmlite.bad_response: Netease Music returned an unexpected response.
error.moemusic.ncmlite.identifier.album_: That Netease album does not contain any playable tracks.
This Netease album link cannot be queued as a single track.
error.moemusic.ncmlite.identifier.channe: That Netease radio channel does not contain any playable episodes.
This Netease radio channel link cannot be queued as a single track.
error.moemusic.ncmlite.identifier.invali: That Netease song ID is invalid.
error.moemusic.ncmlite.identifier.playli: That Netease playlist does not contain any playable tracks.
This Netease playlist link cannot be queued as a single track.
error.moemusic.ncmlite.identifier.progra: That Netease program does not expose a playable main song.
error.moemusic.ncmlite.identifier.unsupp: That Netease link type is not supported.
error.moemusic.ncmlite.request_failed: Netease Music request failed with code %1$s.
error.moemusic.ncmlite.resolve.no_stream: Netease Music did not provide a playable stream URL.
error.moemusic.ncmlite.resolve.vip_requi: This Netease track requires VIP playback.
